extraction.one_line_summary: KRAGH ANDERSEN Søren won stage 3 atop Curyat after catching late solo attempt by DE PLUS Laurens in final meters
tactical_patterns: DE PLUS Laurens went solo on finishing climb at Curyat but lacked reserves to hold off chasers from splintered peloton
KRAGH ANDERSEN Søren at 22 showed unexpected climbing speed for Sunweb on summit finish, suggesting stage race GC potential

rider_signals.DE PLUS Laurens: neutral: initiated winning move on final climb but couldn't sustain effort to finish, timing slightly premature
rider_signals.KRAGH ANDERSEN Søren: positive: first pro win on summit finish ahead of fragmented group reveals climbing strength beyond expectations for domestique role
